interaction_phrase: led by the incredible work at Rome Labs
occurrence_sentence: This bill will ensure the Department of Defense, led by the incredible work at Rome Labs, is able to outpace our adversaries and rapidly develop and transition quantum technologies to our service members.

interaction_phrase: advancing quantum capabilities with the Department of Defense
occurrence_sentence: Clarkson University is among our nation's technological institutions advancing quantum capabilities with the Department of Defense through partnerships like the one we have with Rome Labs, as well as defense contractors on all facets of applied research and educating graduates ready to lead industry in advancing these technologies.

interaction_phrase: the DQAA will empower the Department of Defense to find the applications
occurrence_sentence: At a time when our race for quantum supremacy against China is crucial to the security of America, the DQAA will empower the Department of Defense to find the applications of quantum technology that best serve its needs and requirements, today and far into the future, said Arthur Herman Senior Fellow, Hudson Institute & Director, Quantum Alliance Initiative.
